[user]what is an improbability?
[Ninereeds]This is a measure of how unlikely something is. An improbability describes an event with a very small chance of happening. Finding a four-leaf clover in a big field is one example. Winning a lottery is another example of high improbability. Everyday events like a sunny day have a higher chance. Improbability is not certainty.
